creator: venglin@freebsd.lublin.pl
text:
Kernel panics, when trying to mount written, but non-fixated CD-ROM.

Fix: 

Unknown.
How-To-Repeat: 
	1. Burn CD-R without fixate command.
	2. Leave CD in recorder (CDROMs usually doesn't read non-fixated CDs
	   at all)
	3. Mount it.
	4. Panic (page fault).
